depends_on.reason: Staff recipients and actors come from staff user records.
Template, trigger, bulk, approval and export access require roles.
School coordinator recipients and school status come from school onboarding.
Payment notifications are triggered by finance events.
Slot publication/reschedule notifications are triggered by exam slot events.
Material release/replacement/revocation notifications are triggered by material events.
Shipment, receipt, mismatch and incident notifications are triggered by courier events.
Result publication/correction notifications are triggered by results events.
Certificate generation/publication/reissue/revocation notifications are triggered by certificate events.
Security/critical messages and exports require audit/security review.

provides: delivery status, failed notification, approval and provider health KPIs
failed critical delivery tasks and approval tasks
notification delivery, failure, template and audit reports
